hf_reference.endianness_note: The occupation list is indexed as n_p for spin orbital/qubit p. Qiskit count strings are usually printed as c[n-1]...c[0] when qubit q[i] is measured into classical bit c[i].
hf_reference.orbital_to_qubit_order: spin orbital p maps to qubit p

mfe_by_power.mfe_reference_formula: Store raw MFE y_k as the non-scalar correlation measured relative to the vacuum branch. Do not divide by a simulated <vac|V_k|vac> or by per-sampled qDRIFT reference phases. Apply only the zero-body scalar phase analytically.

Store raw MFE y_k as the non-scalar correlation measured relative to the vacuum branch. Do not divide by a simulated <vac|V_k|vac> or by per-sampled qDRIFT reference phases. Apply only the zero-body scalar phase analytically.

Store raw MFE y_k as the non-scalar correlation measured relative to the vacuum branch. Do not divide by a simulated <vac|V_k|vac> or by per-sampled qDRIFT reference phases. Apply only the zero-body scalar phase analytically.

Store raw MFE y_k as the non-scalar correlation measured relative to the vacuum branch. Do not divide by a simulated <vac|V_k|vac> or by per-sampled qDRIFT reference phases. Apply only the zero-body scalar phase analytically.

notes: This is the deterministic UQK branch: every time step uses the saved non-scalar Trotter block and applies the scalar phase analytically.
C0 is measured for diagnostics and then stored as exactly 1 when ENFORCE_C0_EXACT is true.
The S matrix uses Toeplitz symmetry S_mn=C_(n-m) and C_-k=conj(C_k).
No IBM credentials or QPU backend are used in this script.

backend_mode.local_noiseless_statevector: Aer statevector simulator with shot sampling; no credentials or hardware.

option_documentation.krylov_dimension: Matrix dimension M; S has shape M x M.
option_documentation.max_correlation_power: Must be >= M-1 for S; using M also prepares C_M for projected U later.
option_documentation.qdrift_segment_count_Nd: Number of sampled grouped factors per stochastic chunk.

rough_numeric_ranges.krylov_dimension: 2-4 for debugging, 5-10 for early studies, larger values need care with conditioning.

option_documentation.shots_per_mfe_experiment: Shots for each of F1, F2_plus, F2_i. In stochastic mode this is per sampled instance.
option_documentation.stochastic_instances_per_correlation: Number of independent stochastic chunks averaged for each nonzero C_k.

stochastic_weight_convention.group_pauli_l1_norm: For non-scalar K_mu=sum_rho alpha_mu,rho P_mu,rho, use h_mu=w_mu=sum_rho |alpha_mu,rho|, G_mu=K_mu/h_mu, lambda=sum_mu w_mu, and p_mu=w_mu/lambda.

uqk_mode.standard: Use deterministic non-scalar Trotter blocks plus the analytic scalar phase.
uqk_mode.stochastic: Average qDRIFT-sampled grouped chunks for total time T_k=k*dt.

source_target.description: Local, topology-free transpilation to GENERIC_BASIS_GATES. No hardware coupling map is imposed.
source_target.note: This script transpiles and serializes circuits; it does not submit jobs.

stochastic_sampling.current_archive_convention_note: The grouped Pauli archive stores K_mu directly rather than a separate h_mu and normalized G_mu. This script defines an effective positive h_mu from the Pauli L1 norm and leaves all coefficient signs in G_mu.
stochastic_sampling.implemented_sampled_circuit: For total time T_k=k*dt, each sampled instance is prod_s exp[-i theta_k G_mu_s], theta_k=lambda*T_k/N_d. Each G_mu is rebuilt from grouped Pauli terms using PauliEvolutionGate(SparsePauliOp(K_mu/h_mu), time=theta_k).
stochastic_sampling.qdrift_formula: Write H=E_scalar I + sum_mu K_mu. For non-scalar groups, define h_mu=w_mu=sum_rho |alpha_mu,rho|, G_mu=K_mu/h_mu, lambda=sum_mu w_mu, and p_mu=w_mu/lambda. A sampled chunk for T_k=k*dt uses prod_s exp[-i (lambda*T_k/N_d) G_mu_s]. The zero-body scalar phase exp(-i E_scalar T_k) is applied analytically after MFE.
